units.title: Work Safely in Refrigeration and Air-Conditioning Work Environment

learning_outcomes.description: UNDERSTAND THE IMPORTANCE OF PERSONAL HEALTH AND HYGIENE

performance_criteria.description: Explain the importance of wearing clean, neat and appropriate Personal Protective Equipment in the work environment.
Always Work safely, complying with health and safety and other relevant regulations and guidelines. (Nigerian Factory Health and Safety Act of 2015)
Get any cuts, grazes and wounds treated by an appropriate and qualified person, in the workplace
Report illness and infection promptly to Appropriate persons
Explain the importance of maintaining good Personal hygiene
Explain your responsibility under the (Nigerian Factory Health and Safety Act of 2015) as it relates to your occupation
Explain how to follow general rules on Hygiene must be followed.
Identify correct Personal Protection Equipment such as Head Protection, Foot Protection, Face and Eye Protection, Hand and Body protection And regulatory protection.
Describe how to deal with cuts, grazes and wounds and why it is important to Do so.
Explain the importance of working in healthy, safe and secure workplace
Explain how to report accidents or near accidents quickly and accurately to Appropriate personnel.
Describe Pollution control and disposal of waste with organic and inorganic Waste disposal methods

performance_criteria.description: Identify any hazards or potential hazards And act appropriately

Describe organizational security Procedures and why these are important

Explain why accidents and near accidents should be reported and who they should be reported to

Identify where to find first-aid equipment and who the registered first-Aider is in the workplace
Explain safe lifting and handling Techniques that should be followed
Explain other ways of working safely, Relevant to one position and why they are important
Describe organizational emergency procedures
State possible causes for fire in Work place.
Describe how to minimize the possibility of Fire in the workplace
Explain where to find alarms and how to Set them off
Explain why a fire should never be approached unless it is safe to
